name: CylindricalCrop
label: Cylindrical Crop
description: Crop a volume to a cylindrical region. Voxels outside the cylinder are set to a fill value. The cylinder axis can be oriented arbitrarily.

parameters.name: center_x
parameters.label: Center X
parameters.description: X coordinate of a point on the cylinder axis (voxels). Default: volume center.

parameters.name: center_y
parameters.label: Center Y
parameters.description: Y coordinate of a point on the cylinder axis (voxels). Default: volume center.

parameters.name: center_z
parameters.label: Center Z
parameters.description: Z coordinate of a point on the cylinder axis (voxels). Default: volume center.

parameters.name: axis_x
parameters.label: Axis X
parameters.description: X component of the cylinder axis direction.

parameters.name: axis_y
parameters.label: Axis Y
parameters.description: Y component of the cylinder axis direction.

parameters.name: axis_z
parameters.label: Axis Z
parameters.description: Z component of the cylinder axis direction.

parameters.name: radius
parameters.label: Radius
parameters.description: Cylinder radius in voxels. Default: half the smallest dimension perpendicular to axis.

parameters.name: fill_value
parameters.label: Fill Value
parameters.description: Value assigned to voxels outside the cylinder.
